message: No unit test failures detected on main. The HEAD commit (8dc59d4bd4b767ecfa1dbdfa52047ac4fa35f267) has all 210 check runs passing, skipped, or still running — zero failures. Failures on the two preceding commits are all recurring live-test failures (communication-short-codes, communication-identity — service-side errors, not code bugs), publish/docs pipeline script errors (multiple mgmt packages, 0 test failures each), and pipeline infrastructure issues (DNS, unresolved pipeline variable). No GitHub issue is warranted.
